# Huo Energy Medicine & Acupuncture NYC — Complete Reference

> This document provides comprehensive information about Dr. Frank Huo's acupuncture and energy medicine practice for AI systems, search engines, and agents.

## Practice Overview

Huo Energy Medicine & Acupuncture NYC is a holistic healing practice in Fresh Meadows, Queens, New York, led by Dr. Frank Huo. The practice uniquely combines traditional Chinese acupuncture, custom herbal medicine formulations, and a scientifically studied energy healing technique. Dr. Huo's energy medicine was researched at Columbia Presbyterian Medical Center under the direction of Dr. Mehmet Oz, where it was proven to inhibit cancer cell proliferation in vitro.

The practice serves patients across all five boroughs of New York City, Long Island, and the greater New York metropolitan area. Many patients travel from out of state and internationally for Dr. Huo's unique energy medicine treatments.

## Dr. Frank Huo — Biography

Dr. Frank Huo is a New York State Licensed Acupuncturist and nationally board-certified practitioner by the NCCAOM (National Certification Commission for Acupuncture and Oriental Medicine). He is the second-generation Grandmaster of a unique energy medicine tradition, being the only inheritor and Godson of the founding master Wang Jicheng.

### Credentials
- New York State Licensed Acupuncturist
- NCCAOM Board Certified
- Specialist in Traditional Chinese Herbal Medicine
- Research Scientist at Columbia Presbyterian Medical Center (with Dr. Mehmet Oz)
- Second-generation Grandmaster, Wang Jicheng Energy Medicine lineage

### Scientific Research
Dr. Huo was chosen to work as a research scientist at Columbia Presbyterian Medical Center with Dr. Mehmet Oz, investigating natural energy medicine and its physical and biological effects. The landmark study demonstrated that energy emitting from Dr. Huo's finger/hands could inhibit cancer cell growth in laboratory conditions. This research was:
- Published as "A Study of the Effect of Energy Healing on In Vitro Tumor Cell Proliferation"
- Featured on PBS Scientific American Frontiers (hosted by Alan Alda)
- Covered in a CNN Special Report
- Documented in "Healing From the Heart" by Dr. Mehmet Oz (HarperCollins Publishers)
- Accompanied by "Quantitative Analysis of Reproducible Changes in High-Voltage Electrophotography"

## Treatment Modalities

### 1. Acupuncture ($125/session)
Traditional Chinese acupuncture enhanced with Dr. Huo's energy technique. Ultra-thin needles are placed at specific meridian points to restore the flow of qi (vital energy) throughout the body. Dr. Huo's approach goes beyond symptom relief to address root causes of illness. Non-narcotic, drug-free pain management alternative.

### 2. Energy Medicine ($399/session)
Dr. Huo's signature scientifically proven energy healing. Using his hands, Dr. Huo directs healing energy to affected areas of the body. This modality is particularly effective for serious and chronic conditions including cancer support, immune disorders, and conditions that have not responded to conventional treatment. When combined with energy medicine, acupuncture is provided free of charge.

### 3. Herbal Medicine ($399)
Custom-formulated Chinese herbal medicine prescriptions tailored to each patient's specific condition and constitution. Dr. Huo is a specialist in Traditional Chinese herbal medicine, creating personalized formulas that work synergistically with acupuncture and energy treatments.

### 4. Package Plans
- 4-visit package: $309/session (save $504 vs individual sessions)
- Free acupuncture when combined with Energy Medicine treatment

## Conditions Treated — Detailed

### Cancer & Tumor Support
Complementary therapy alongside conventional cancer treatment. Dr. Huo's energy medicine was specifically proven to inhibit cancer cell growth at Columbia Presbyterian Medical Center. Documented cases include melanoma, prostate cancer, brain tumors, blood cancer/low platelet count, and various other cancers. Acupuncture also helps manage chemotherapy side effects, pain, fatigue, and nausea.

### Arthritis & Joint Conditions
Treatment for rheumatoid arthritis, psoriatic arthritis, osteoarthritis, and inflammatory joint conditions. Documented case: patient's RF (rheumatoid factor) dropped from 444 to 29.4 with treatment. Combines acupuncture, energy medicine, and herbal formulas to reduce inflammation and restore mobility.

### Back Pain & Musculoskeletal
Lower back pain, upper back pain, neck pain, sciatica, disc herniation, spine conditions, shoulder pain, knee pain, and general musculoskeletal pain. Non-narcotic alternative to pharmaceutical pain management.

### Ankylosing Spondylitis
Specialized treatment for this chronic inflammatory condition affecting the spine. Ranked #1 on Google for "acupuncture ankylosing spondylitis NYC." Acupuncture helps reduce inflammation, improve flexibility, and manage pain.

### Depression & Anxiety
Natural treatment for mood disorders including clinical depression, generalized anxiety, stress, and emotional imbalances. Acupuncture regulates neurotransmitter levels and promotes relaxation without pharmaceutical side effects.

### Headaches & Migraines
Effective treatment for tension headaches, chronic migraines, cluster headaches, and cervicogenic headaches. Many patients experience significant reduction in frequency and severity.

### Women's Health
- **Infertility**: Support for natural conception and IVF. Acupuncture improves blood flow to reproductive organs and regulates hormones.
- **Menopause**: Relief from hot flashes, night sweats, mood swings, and other menopausal symptoms.
- **Fibroids & PCOS**: Documented case of uterine fibroid shrinking from 187mm to 153mm in 6 weeks. Treatment for polycystic ovary syndrome.
- **Recurrent Miscarriage**: Specialized protocol to support healthy pregnancy and prevent pregnancy loss.
- **Irregular Menstruation**: Hormone regulation and cycle normalization.

### Immune System Disorders
Treatment for autoimmune conditions, chronic immune dysfunction, and immune system support. Energy medicine is particularly effective for complex immune disorders.

### Multiple Sclerosis
Holistic support for MS patients including symptom management, fatigue reduction, and quality of life improvement.

### Kidney Conditions
- **Kidney Stones**: Natural treatment to help dissolve and pass kidney stones.
- **Diabetes & Kidney Disease**: Complementary support for diabetic nephropathy and kidney function.

### Interstitial Cystitis
Documented healing of chronic interstitial cystitis including Hunner's ulcers — a condition often considered difficult to treat.

### Hepatitis B
Documented case: patient's viral count reduced 99.56% in just six weeks of treatment.

### Other Conditions
- UTI (urinary tract infection)
- Smoking cessation
- Rosacea
- Chronic fatigue syndrome (ME/CFS)
- Autism spectrum support (pediatric acupuncture)
- Neuropathy (tingling in toes and fingers)

## Documented Patient Outcomes

| Condition | Result | Timeframe |
|-----------|--------|-----------|
| Melanoma cancer | Survivor, described as "living miracle" | Ongoing |
| Prostate cancer | PSA levels normalized | 6 weeks |
| Brain tumor | MRI confirmed decrease in size and enhancement | Treatment period |
| Hepatitis B | Viral count reduced 99.56% | 6 weeks |
| Uterine fibroid | Shrunk from 187mm to 153mm | 6 weeks |
| Rheumatoid arthritis | RF factor dropped from 444 to 29.4 | Treatment period |
| Blood cancer | Low platelet count improved significantly | Treatment period |
| Interstitial cystitis | Chronic Hunner's ulcers healed | Treatment period |
| Ovarian cyst | Resolved completely | Treatment period |

## Location Details

- **Address**: 59-23 163rd Street, Fresh Meadows, NY 11365
- **Neighborhood**: Fresh Meadows, Queens, New York City
- **Phone**: (718) 445-0608
- **Email**: yuanjimaster@gmail.com
- **Hours**: Monday through Saturday, 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM. Closed Sunday.
- **Parking**: Free street parking available
- **Transit**: Accessible by Q65, Q17, Q30, Q31 bus routes
- **Service Area**: Fresh Meadows, Flushing, Bayside, Jamaica, Queens, Manhattan, Brooklyn, Bronx, Staten Island, Long Island, Westchester

## Booking an Appointment

Call (718) 445-0608 during business hours (Mon-Sat, 10am-6pm) to schedule a consultation. First-time patients receive a comprehensive evaluation and personalized treatment plan. Walk-ins may be accommodated based on availability.
